creator: schmidt@ze.tum.de
text:
Created attachment 209992
Output of the compiler when compiling xlockmore on 11.3 with default options

Trying to compile xlockmore on a freebsd 11.3 matching the the default setting fails because MESAGL and FREETYPE options are off by default but seam to be needed to link xlockmore. 

See the attached File for errors. 

When I activate MESAGL and FREETYPE I get the message the FREETYPE is not supported with FreeBSD 11.3

===>  xlockmore-5.61 FREETYPE support requires FreeBSD version 12+.
